Company Description

About Sutherland

Artificial Intelligence. Automation.Cloud engineering.
Advanced analytics.For business leaders, these are key
factors of success. For us, they’re our core expertise.

We work with iconic brands worldwide. We bring them a unique
value proposition through market-leading technology and
business process excellence.

We’ve created over 200 unique inventions under several
patents across AI and other critical technologies.
Leveraging our advanced products and platforms, we drive
digital transformation, optimize critical business
operations, reinvent experiences, and pioneer new solutions,
all provided through a seamless “as a service” model.

For each company, we provide new keys for their businesses,
the people they work with, and the customers they serve. We
tailor proven and rapid formulas, to fit their unique DNA.We
bring together human expertise and artificial intelligence
to develop digital chemistry. This unlocks new
possibilities, transformative outcomes and enduring
relationships. Sutherland

Unlocking digital performance. Delivering measurable
results.


Job Description

We are seeking an Agentic AI Developer to build intelligent,
autonomous AI systems that can reason, retrieve knowledge,
and act across multiple tools and data sources. The role
focuses on developing multi-agent pipelines, RAG systems,
and real-time AI-driven applications.

Responsibilities

- Design and develop agentic AI systems using LLMs, tools, and
  orchestration frameworks.
- Build RAG pipelines for structured and unstructured data.
- Implement multi-agent workflows for document understanding,
  OCR, and data extraction.
- Build APIs and services using Python and FastAPI for AI
  pipelines.
- Evaluate and improve model accuracy, latency, and
  reliability

Qualifications

Required Skills

- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL.
- Experience with LLMs, RAG, and multi-agent systems.
- Hands-on with LangChain, LangGraph or similar frameworks.
- Experience with vector databases and OCR tools.
- Experience deploying models on cloud platforms (Azure
  preferred).
- Knowledge of prompt engineering and agent reasoning
  patterns.
- Familiarity with cloud deployment and Docker.

Good to Have

- Exposure to cloud platforms (GCP) .
- Exposure to MLOps experience.
- Knowledge of CI/CD tools.

Additional Information

All your information will be kept confidential according to
EEO guidelines.
